name: CME GROUP INC.
sic_description: Security & Commodity Brokers, Dealers, Exchanges & Services
summary: CME Group operates derivatives exchanges (CME, CBOT, NYMEX, COMEX) offering futures, options, cash and OTC products across interest rates, equity indexes, foreign exchange, agricultural commodities, energy, metals, and cryptocurrencies. It provides central counterparty clearing, cash and repo fixed income trading via BrokerTec, spot and OTC FX trading via EBS, market data services, and research and analytics tools to clients worldwide.
